% subst-test.tex -- retrieves subst-bank problems with every variable FIXED via
% the \problem{id}[a=1,...] override, so the rendered output is deterministic.
% test_engine_correctness.py builds this and asserts the exact substituted /
% computed values via pdftotext.
\documentclass{autoexam}
\versions{A}
\examsetup{number=1, date={Engine Test}}
\loadbank{subst-bank.tex}

\begin{document}
\begin{problems}
	\problem{quad}[a=1, b=2, c=3]
	\problem{calc}[a=3, b=4, c=5]
\end{problems}
\end{document}
